name: structured-profile
description: AI-powered resume and cover letter generation from structured profiles with semantic matching
author: grokify
context:
# Structured Profile Resume Pipeline

This plugin provides AI-powered resume generation using semantic matching.

## Available Skills

- `/structured-profile:parse-jd <file>` - Parse job description semantically
- `/structured-profile:generate-resume --profile <id> --jd <file>` - Generate tailored resume

## Agent Team

- resume-coordinator - Orchestrates the pipeline
- jd-analyst - Semantic JD analysis
- profile-matcher - Profile-to-JD matching
- resume-generator - Tailored resume creation
- resume-evaluator - LLM-as-Judge quality scoring
- resume-refiner - Feedback-based improvement

## Workflow

JD → Analysis → Matching → Generation → Evaluation → (Refinement) → Output
